chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2447 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on Misc. No.14347/2021 (Urgency) 2. For order on Misc. No.14348/2021 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of bail 31.12.2021 Mr. Sarfaraz Ali, advocate for the applicant along with applicant ------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through instant bail application, applicant Shaikh Fareed son of Shaikh Yousuf seeks protective bail in FIR No.03/2021 under Section 162, 165, 420/34 PPC, registered at PS ACE Karachi. It is, inter alia, contended that the applicant has nothing to do with the alleged crime as portrayed by the complainant Abbas Ali Larik in connection with the allegations put forward by him with regard to transfer, posting and assuming charge and relieving the charge of whatsoever nature. Per learned counsel, the complainant has booked the applicant under Section 162, 165, 420/34 PPC read with Section 5 Act-II of 1947. It is further contended that the applicant has not issued any illegal order as portrayed by the complainant. He prayed for protection to the applicant enabling him to surrender before the learned trial Court. Primarily, this is a protective bail and there is no impediment to allow the applicant to surrender before the concerned trial Court. Without prejudice to the merits of the case, applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days to appear before the concerned Court subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees one hundred thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Primarily, this is a protective bail and there is no impediment to allow the applicant to surrender before the concerned trial Court. Without prejudice to the merits of the case, applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days to appear before the concerned Court subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees one hundred thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 06.1.2022 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case of non- cooperation with investigation, the concerned trial Court would be competent to draw negative inference against the applicant. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Zahid/*
